name: 3pc Christmas Gift Ornament Set Glass Fashionista - Wondershop™
description:
Surprise a fashionista with the 3-Piece Gift Ornament Set Glass Fashionista from Wondershop™. This three-piece Christmas ornament set includes a pair of heel sandals, lipstick, and a purse, neatly packed in a box to make it a perfect Christmas gift for yourself or a loved one. Designed for indoor use, these pieces feature built-in loops for easy display on a tree.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
